# Implement Class B Vertical Slice

Goal: implement the first offline MVP vertical slice for Class B.

Scope:

- local seed content skeleton;
- license class B visible on home;
- study mode loads Class B questions;
- exam mode selects random Class B questions;
- result screen calculates score;
- review screen shows selected/correct answers;
- exam session saved locally;
- history displays completed sessions.

Constraints:

- no backend;
- no subscription;
- no login;
- no analytics;
- SQLDelight for persistence;
- domain logic tested;
- ViewModel state explicit;
- routes pass IDs only.

Expected deliverables:

1. Data/domain models.
2. SQLDelight schema or schema delta.
3. Seed import mechanism with tiny placeholder Class B pack.
4. Repositories/use cases.
5. ViewModels and UI states.
6. Screens or minimal UI placeholders.
7. Tests for scoring and exam selection.
8. Short implementation note.
